title: mesosphaerum concinnum
intro: Mesosphaerum concinnum, also known as Mexican mint marigold, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum concinnum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
